# Daily Report — 2026-04-23

## Task Completed
Added retry logic with exponential backoff to all HTTP requests.

Introduced `_make_request(method, url, **kwargs)` in `helpers.py`. It wraps
`requests.get/post/put/patch/delete` with up to 3 retries and exponential
delays (1 s, 2 s, 4 s by default). Transient failures that trigger a retry:
- HTTP status codes 429, 500, 502, 503, 504
- `ConnectionError` and `Timeout` network exceptions
- 429 responses honour the `Retry-After` header when present

All 20 tool files updated to call `_make_request` instead of the raw
`requests.*` methods. Existing tests required no changes because the helper
resolves the method via `getattr(requests, method.lower())`, so
`@patch('requests.get')` mocks still intercept calls correctly.

## Test Results
- Total tests: 618
- Coverage: 89%
- All passing: yes

## Security
Pre-existing vulnerabilities in third-party dependencies (cryptography, mcp,
pyjwt, setuptools, wheel, pip). No new vulnerabilities introduced.
